sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114055" key="xio/ninos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χῐόν-ῐνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114055.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">snow-white,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῇ χροιᾷ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1645.tlg001:10J" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.Euerg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10J.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
